focus: ML-priority post: soccer + MLB moneyline records are the story; today's ML-heavy card led by Colombia SUPER
mechanic: Record-on-an-angle flex (@WizBetz pattern from playbook) — fresh vs discipline narrative (7/1) and call-your-shot (6/30)

records.MLB ML: 168 picks, 54.2% win, +5.1% ROI — biggest sample tracked

internalTape.Colombia ML -230 (6u SUPER ELITE): prov 5-0, HC2, $208K (91%), hot2trot +$1.16M sizing 2.6x, ~9:30 PM ET
internalTape.Egypt ML +135 (2.5u): $267K (78%), 11 wallets, suntori +$560K sizing 13.8x, kicks ~1 PM ET (57 min) — NOTE prov 4-5 (mixed), keep secondary
internalTape.Tampa Bay Rays ML -103 (5u): prov 3-0 but money split 37% — do not tout as lopsided

hero_single.text:
We're not a parlay account. We bet moneylines — and the moneylines are printing.

Soccer ML: 17-5 (77%)
MLB ML: our biggest sample of the season, profitable all year

Today's card is ML-heavy, led by our biggest play on the board:

Colombia ML (6u) — 5 proven winners backing it, zero against
Egypt +135 (2.5u) — the plus-money dog the sharps grabbed early, kicks off ~1 PM ET
Rays ML and Nationals ML behind them

The public chases parlays. The pros grind the line.

Tail the moneylines, or fade the streak?

alt_hooks: Our soccer moneylines are 17-5. Not a typo — 77%.
One bet type has carried this account all season: the moneyline.
